title: Simple Hardcore Respawn
description: This mod allows you to respawn other players in Hardcore mode, at the cost of totem of undying.
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1179475877436858400?logo=discord&color=blue)](http://discord.gg/e2SE62WT6x) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-CurseForge-orange?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-hardcore-respawn) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-Modrinth-green?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/project/simple-hardcore-respawn) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source_Code-GitHub-white?logo=github)](https://github.com/Bles-1/simple-hardcore-respawn) For issues and suggestions join our Discord (click) # This mod requires Lore Link library to work. [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-orange?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lorelink) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-green?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/project/lore-link) ### Authors:  Bles1 (me) & Stejser ### Credits: [__Blockbench - image editor__](https://www.blockbench.net/) **This mod allows you to respawn other players in Hardcore mode, at the cost of totem of undying.**  ### Description:  _You're playing with your friend on Hardcore. You split into teams: you mined diamonds and iron, and he did the farming. You also finished a raid and got a totem. Suddenly, you see a message in the chat: "**YourFriend was poked to death by a sweet berry bush**." What should you do?_  _It's __simple__! With __Simple__ Hardcore Respawn_ _Craft a Re-Spawner and use the totem to respawn your friend on Hardcore._ ## How to respawn a player:
Spoiler

Step one: Craft Re Spawner

Step two: Charge it using magic items

Step three: Rename Totem of Undying to nick of player you want to respawn

Step four: Use totem on respawner and respawn your friend*!

* Your friend must be online and in spectator mode. (unless gamerule respawnerUnbanning is true)

  ### Extra features: ### Optional particles Go to `.minecraft/config/ultraconfig/simple_hardcore_respawn.json` and modify "particles" field to one of these: * STANDARD - default (totem) * TOTEM * SOUL * FANTASY ### /gamerule respawnerUnbanning [true|false] Set to true if your server has a mechanic for banning players upon death. If true, respawner will unban player with given nickname. ### /gamerule respawnerCharging [true|false] Default true. This gamerule allows you to respawn players without charging, like in version 1.0. For these who don't like new charging mechanics. ### (Advanced) Extensions/Configuration You can make java extensions for this mod, see [Lore Link Developer Guide](https://github.com/Bles-1/LoreLink/blob/master/DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md).   ## FAQ: ### Game crashes while starting with message `Multiple mods tried to register custom action handler for Simple Hardcore Respawn. To avoid this error, try deleting conflicted mods or choose one in config/ultraconfig/lorelink.json file in duplicate_strategy field.` [Go here](https://github.com/Bles-1/LoreLink/blob/master/DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md) ### Can I use this mod in my video? Yes, as long as you provide __credits.__ (Author and download link in description) If you want to use **modpack** that contain our mod, you should give credits to the modpack. Optional, you can give us link to this video on discord. ### Can I use this mod in my modpack? If you want to use our mod in your modpack **on curseforge**, __you don't need to do anything__ else, because curseforge automatically creates mods list. If you want to use our mod in your modpack **outside curseforge**, you should provide __credits__. (consider creating a included mods list) Optional, you can give us link to this modpack on discord. ### Can I use this mod in something else? See information on discord. ### Will you upgrade this mod to new minecraft version? Yes. ### Will you downgrade this mod to older minecraf version? No. ### Will you add some features? Send your suggestion on discord. ### Can I configure required items? Yes! Configuration datapack template is available on discord.
